common.noPermission: You don't have permission to use this command.
common.commandError: An error occurred while executing the command. Our team has been notified.
common.commandNotFound: This command was not found. Try again or contact an administrator.
common.botMissingPermission: I don't have permission to do this.
common.apiTimeout: The API took too long to respond. Try again in a few moments.
common.apiAuthError: Internal API authentication error. Notify an administrator.
common.insufficientResources: You don't have enough keys or chests for this.

logModal.noPermissionDesc: You don't have permission to use the command
logModal.errorDefault: An error occurred while executing the command.

daily.title: 🎁 Daily reward claimed!
daily.description:
You received **{chests} Hextech Chest(s)** and **{keys} Key(s)**!
Use `/openchest` to open your chests.
daily.footer: Come back in 24 hours to claim again!
daily.alreadyClaimedDesc:
You already claimed your daily reward today.
Available again {relative} ({full}).

openchest.footerCanOpen: Choose a chest below to open.
openchest.footerCannotOpen: You need keys and chests to open. Use `/daily` to claim your daily reward!
openchest.loadingDesc: Drawing your skin, please wait a moment.
openchest.notYourChest: You cannot interact with someone else's chest.
openchest.timedOut: Time's up — use `/openchest` again whenever you want.

help.title: 📖 Command List
help.description: Here are all available commands organized by category.

warn.title: ⚠️ Warning Applied
warn.noPermission: You don't have permission to warn users.
warn.botCannotWarn: Couldn't warn the user (missing bot permissions).

unwarn.title: ✅ Warning Removed
unwarn.description: You removed a warning from **{user}** successfully.
unwarn.noPermission: You don't have permission to remove warnings.
unwarn.botCannotUnwarn: Couldn't remove the warning (missing bot permissions).

mute.title: 🔇 Mute Applied
mute.noPermission: You don't have permission to mute users.
mute.botCannotMute: Couldn't mute the user (missing bot permissions).

unmute.title: 🔊 Unmute Applied
unmute.noPermission: You don't have permission to unmute users.
unmute.botCannotUnmute: Couldn't unmute the user (missing bot permissions).

ban.title: 🔨 Ban Applied
ban.noPermission: You don't have permission to ban users.
ban.botCannotBan: Couldn't ban the user (missing bot permissions).

unban.title: ✅ Unban Applied
unban.noPermission: You don't have permission to unban users.
unban.botCannotUnban: Couldn't unban the user (missing bot permissions).

give.title: 🎁 Item Given
give.noPermission: You don't have permission to give items.

reload.title: 🔄 Reload
reload.noPermission: You don't have permission to reload.

stop.title: 🛑 Stopping bot
stop.noPermission: You don't have permission to stop the bot.

setupRoles.title: ⚙️ Role Setup
setupRoles.description: Roles and moderation channel configured successfully.
setupRoles.noPermission: You don't have permission to set up roles.

serverSettings.title: ⚙️ Server Settings
serverSettings.noSettings: No settings found for this server.
serverSettings.updatedDesc: Server settings have been updated successfully.
serverSettings.noPermission: You don't have permission to view server settings.

leagueProfile.loadingDesc: Fetching player information from Riot API.
leagueProfile.notFound: Player not found. Check the region, name, and tag.
leagueProfile.apiError: Error fetching player data. Try again later.
leagueProfile.taglineTooLong: The tagline must have a maximum of 5 characters.
leagueProfile.taglineFormat: You must insert only the numbers of the tagline. Do not insert "#"
leagueProfile.accountError: An error occurred while trying to get the account information.
leagueProfile.summonerNotFound: The summoner you entered does not exist. Please check the account name and server.
leagueProfile.summonerError: An error occurred while trying to get the summoner information.
leagueProfile.queueError: An error occurred while trying to get the queue information.
leagueProfile.masteryError: An error occurred while trying to get the mastery information.
leagueProfile.ddragonError: An error occurred while trying to get the DDragon version.

leagueMatchHistory.title: Match History
leagueMatchHistory.accountError: An error occurred while fetching the account information.
leagueMatchHistory.historyError: An error occurred while fetching the match history.
leagueMatchHistory.championError: An error occurred while fetching the champion data.
leagueMatchHistory.ddragonError: An error occurred while fetching the DDragon version.
leagueMatchHistory.matchError: An error occurred while analyzing the match {number} statistics.
leagueMatchHistory.errorProcessing: An error occurred while analyzing the match statistics.
leagueMatchHistory.errorCollector: An error occurred while processing your action. Try again.
leagueMatchHistory.noMatches: An error occurred while fetching the match history, or no matches were found.

leagueQueueSearch.title: Queue Search Results
leagueQueueSearch.noResults: No queues found for the specified elo/division.
leagueQueueSearch.fetchError: An error occurred while fetching the ranked queues.

test.noImages: No images found for these tags.

test.noImagesFilter: No images found with this filter.

test.fetchError: An error occurred while fetching the images.
